articles.title: US-Iran talks to begin in Switzerland as Tehran says it closed Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: The US disputed Iran's claim the waterway is shut, a move Tehran says was a response to Israeli attacks in Lebanon.

articles.title: Nine people in critical condition among 100 injured in fatal Bedford train crash
articles.description: British Transport Police says the collision, which killed a train driver, is being investigated.

articles.title: Talk of Starmer staying on to fight is fading - fast
articles.description: After Andy Burnham’s by-election victory, support for the prime minister is evaporating, writes Laura Kuenssberg.

articles.title: King Charles to reveal personal tax bill for first time as monarch
articles.description: For the first time, the annual financial report for the royals will include how much tax is paid by the monarch.
